chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: In today's video, we will know how audio, video and media elements are used in HTML. We saw in our very first video that we can embed videos in HTML. Today I will tell you how the video is auto-played, how to keep a muted video, and how you can enable and disable video controls.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: Along with that, we will also see very closely about audio, how media can be shown in an overall page. So do like this video and stay in this video because the examples I have used for video tags are amazing. Let's go to the video screen.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: Let's roll the intro. Intro Friends, this time I have made a folder named video10 and I will not waste your time by opening open with code by right-clicking. In fact, I will make it in index.html.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: And the topic of today's video is video. How to play a video in an HTML file? How to put a video? How to put audio? How to put media?

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: So adding a video is very straightforward. I will copy it here, which is our video tag. It has an src attribute. And it has some other attributes that I will discuss with you. But first of all, I want to tell you here

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: that video src is equal to, you will write here like this. So if you have video.mp4, it will play. I have video.mp4. So let's see here. I have put the controls here.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: And I will click here and preview it. And you can see here that this video has come. Now this is a very big video. So what can I do? I can give its width.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: So I can say here width is equal to 555 pixels. And as soon as I do 555 pixels, in fact, I don't need to write px. I will just do 555. Like we don't need to write px in the image.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: We don't need to write px here either. So as soon as I did width is equal to 555, in fact, I do one thing. I do height is equal to 555 so that it becomes smaller. In fact, I make it smaller.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: I do 255. And you see, it came here. Now I play it because I have set the controls. I can play it. Look, there is a better road from America right now.

chunks.text: Tell me your name. Gopindra Jogi. Where have you been in the US? I have been to many places in the US. Tell me your name.

chunks.text: Gopindra Jogi. Hahaha. So what is it? You can play the video like this. Now there are some attributes of the video tag here.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: See, it is very simple to use the video tag. You should have a video. You have given the path of the video. After that, you have given the controls. So these controls will come to you.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: You can download it. You can do full screen. You can mute it. You can do picture in picture. All this is automatically provided by your browser.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: But let me tell you about some attributes. The first attribute is SRC. So you know that put the video here. The name of the video file is SRC. This video file can also come from the external URL.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: You understand. That is, if I have uploaded a video on Amazon S3 or somewhere else, then I can also put the URL there. I mean, it is not necessary that the file is in your computer. It can also be on your server.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: It can also come from a third party. Now what do the controls do? Adds video controls like play, pause, and volume. Which we saw here in the video of Bhupendra Jogi. That you are getting to see the controls here.

chunks.title: Video, Audio & Media in HTML
chunks.text: Now what is this thing? The browser automatically checks that what control ads will be there in your video, what will not be there. Then see what will autoplay do?

chunks.text: It will play automatically as soon as the page loads. Okay. So if I put autoplay here. I mean, I put autoplay here. Okay.
